violations.text: Working containers of water and oil are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The non-food contact surface of the ice machine had an accumulation of residue. PIC cleaned during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. PIC obtained hair restraints for staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -floor and wall junctures -shelving under front service area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

A bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink in the bakery area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Recently sliced tomatoes were observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Liquid eggs observed on the counter at 47 degrees. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved tomatoes to facilitate cooling. Eggs were returned to refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
A staff member was observed wearing apron in the restroom. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
Several buckets were not allowed to air dry before stacking. PIC unstacked containers to allow for air drying. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The faucet to the kettle is in poor repair, observed loose. PIC stated work order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
A leak was observed at the 3-bay sink cleanser/sanitizer dispenser hook-up. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The condensate from the walk-in is draining onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The drain lines from the 3-bay sink are not connected to the drain/grease trap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The fixtures (sinks, toilets, etc) are not fully installed in the restrooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
